name: Airbyte Agents
description: Context layer for AI agents: MCP server and Python SDK giving agents unified access to 50+ business data connectors with pre-assembled context, reducing tool calls by 40–80%.

skills.name: Context Store Search
skills.description: Search pre-assembled business context across Salesforce, HubSpot, Zendesk, Linear, Slack, and 45+ connectors before making live API calls.

skills.name: Live Connector Reads
skills.description: Fetch fresh data from source systems with write-back support to update records, tickets, and messages in the systems of record.

skills.name: Agent SDK Integration
skills.description: Integrate connectors into pydantic-ai, LangChain, OpenAI Agents, and FastMCP via typed Python decorators with built-in retry and error handling.
